titleEn: Syngenta Signs MoU to Be Strategic Partner in India’s First Open-Data Agricultural Ecosystem Annam.AI
titleZh: 先正达签署谅解备忘录，成为印度首个开放数据农业生态系统Annam.AI的战略合作伙伴
summaryZh: 先正达与印度政府支持的Annam.AI项目签署谅解备忘录，成为其战略合作伙伴。Annam.AI旨在构建基于开放数据的全国性农业智能基础设施，为农民提供免费、实时、个性化的AI农事建议，涵盖作物健康、病虫害预测和热应激模型。该项目由印度教育部、农业与农民福利部支持，谷歌等全球技术伙伴参与，由IIT Ropar主导。先正达将贡献其研发和农艺专长，助力精准农业和气候韧性。
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了开放数据与AI在农业中的大规模应用，对智慧畜牧行业具有跨领域借鉴意义，尤其是其病虫害预测、热应激模型和个性化农事建议的技术路径，可直接启发养殖业中的动物健康监测和环境控制方案。
contentFull: By Syngenta Share Syngenta Country Head for France Anne Azam (2nd from right) with India’s Minister of Commerce and Industry Piyush Goyal (3rd from left) and Annam Principal Scientific Advisor to the Government of India Dr. Ajay Sood (3rd from right) at the signing ceremony. India’s agriculture sector is a global powerhouse, uniquely characterized by its massive scale, vast arable land, diverse agro-climatic zones and rich biodiversity. These strengths have propelled the country to become one of the world’s leading producers of crops such as rice and wheat. However, farmers in the country face significant challenges – from erratic monsoons, severe droughts and unseasonal rains compounded by El Nino, to pests and diseases that destroy an estimated 30 percent of crops annually. More than 80 percent of India’s estimated 150 million farming households are composed of smallholder farmers who operate on less than two hectares of land. This limits economies of scale, sets obstacles to the wider adoption of advanced technologies and could widen a systemic gap between large commercial agricultural operations and the bulk of its farming population. Providing India’s farmers with free, real-time and personalized agricultural intelligence – at scale – could transform the country’s agriculture. This vision is at the heart of an ambitious program called Annam.AI, which aims to build a nationwide agricultural intelligence backbone based on open data, that enables precision agriculture and fosters climate resilience. This would provide India’s farmers hyperlocal, AI-powered advisories that integrate crop intelligence, real-time microclimate data and multilingual engagement tools. Annam.AI (Alliance for Next-gen Nourishment through Agriculture Modernization, and denoting “food” in Sanskrit language) is backed by the Government of India through the Ministry of Education, the Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare, global technology partners such as Google, and is driven by IIT Ropar, a premier engineering and technology university in Punjab that is part of the prestigious Indian Institutes of Technology (IIT) system. Syngenta, a global leader in agricultural innovation with a long-standing presence in India, has announced it has signed a Memorandum of Understanding to be a strategic partner in the Annam.AI program, at an event in Nice, France attended by India’s Prime Minister Narendra Modi and France’s President Emmanuel Macron. Syngenta is to leverage its R&D and agronomic expertise in building accurate crop health, pest forecasting and heat stress models. Annam.AI presents a unique opportunity to contribute to a transformative, digital foundation for Indian agriculture that will benefit more than 600 million people in this country. We are deeply honored to work with many talented and committed people in India’s government and universities, as well as with other innovation leaders in fulfilling this vision.” 0 1 5 Syngenta Signs MoU to Be Strategic Partner in India’s First Open-Data Agricultural Ecosystem Annam.AI Subscribe Today For Subscribe Syngenta is one of the world’s leading agriculture companies. translationZh:
印度的农业部门是全球强国，其独特之处在于规模庞大、耕地广阔、农业气候带多样以及生物多样性丰富。这些优势使印度成为水稻和小麦等作物的世界领先生产国之一。然而，该国农民面临着重大挑战——从厄尔尼诺现象加剧的不稳定季风、严重干旱和反季节降雨，到每年摧毁约30%作物的病虫害。印度约1.5亿农户中，超过80%是经营土地不足两公顷的小农户。这限制了规模经济，阻碍了先进技术的更广泛采用，并可能扩大大型商业化农业经营与大多数农业人口之间的系统性差距。

为印度农民大规模提供免费、实时、个性化的农业智能，可以改变该国的农业面貌。这一愿景正是名为Annam.AI的雄心勃勃计划的核心，该计划旨在构建基于开放数据的全国性农业智能基础设施，实现精准农业并增强气候韧性。这将为印度农民提供超本地化的、由人工智能驱动的农事建议，整合作物智能、实时微气候数据和多语言互动工具。Annam.AI（通过农业现代化实现下一代营养联盟，在梵语中意为“食物”）由印度政府通过教育部、农业与农民福利部支持，谷歌等全球技术合作伙伴参与，并由位于旁遮普邦的顶尖工程技术大学——印度理工学院罗巴尔分校（IIT Ropar）主导。

先正达，作为全球农业创新领导者且在印度长期深耕，宣布已在法国尼斯签署谅解备忘录，成为Annam.AI计划的战略合作伙伴。该活动有印度总理纳伦德拉·莫迪和法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙出席。先正达将利用其研发和农艺专长，构建精准的作物健康、病虫害预测和热应激模型。
author: Matt Hopkins
contentHtml:
Agricultural innovation leader to contribute with agronomic expertise in building accurate crop health, pest forecasting and heat stress models.
The post Syngenta Signs MoU to Be Strategic Partner in India’s First Open-Data Agricultural Ecosystem Annam.AI appeared first on Global Ag Tech Initiative.
